name: bandit.extortion_first_demand_pay_three_source_trade_window_mcw
description: Bandit shakedown Pay proof: choose Pay, keep the actual NPC trade UI open, prove distinct player/basecamp-NPC/basecamp-storage payment markers, then satisfy the debt through the same trade offer.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the McWilliams bandit local-contact fixture before toll-control proof begins; this is startup/load footing only

steps.label: advance_299_turns_to_gate_edge
steps.expected_immediate_state: bounded turn advance reaches the shakedown gate edge; proof is deferred to the same-run demand-surface artifact after the final turn

steps.label: advance_final_turn_to_first_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: Bandit shakedown dialogue window is visible with the basecamp-pressure opening and player-facing Pay/Fight choices after the final local-contact turn

steps.label: audit_first_demand_surface_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the bandit camp-style local gate and pay/fight shakedown surface before Pay-window proof
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names camp_style profile, open_shakedown posture, reachable goods, demanded toll, visible Pay/Fight responses, and the NPC trade UI payment bridge

steps.label: choose_pay_open_trade_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: Pay was selected from the visible bandit shakedown dialogue; the actual NPC trade UI / trade window is now open with Pay: debt before any hidden surrender.
steps.abort_reason: selecting Pay did not visibly open the NPC trade UI / inventory filter surface

steps.label: audit_trade_window_debt_and_pool_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove choosing Pay opened the actual NPC trade API / trade window with Pay: debt and the honest pool component counters
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names the actual NPC trade API, Pay: debt title, demanded/reachable values, and payment pool components

steps.label: switch_to_you_pane_and_open_player_marker_filter
steps.expected_immediate_state: switch to player-side trade pane and open the inventory filter; proof is the following same-run UI-trace for the filtered player-inventory marker

steps.label: filter_player_inventory_marker_binoculars
steps.expected_visible_fact: Same open Pay trade window, filtered to the distinct player-inventory marker item.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_player_marker_binoculars
steps.abort_reason: same open Pay trade selector did not trace the player inventory marker binoculars after filtering
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run trade selector UI-trace proves the filtered Pay window contains binoculars from the character/player-side pool

steps.label: open_filter_clear_for_basecamp_npc_marker
steps.expected_immediate_state: clear the trade filter without closing the Pay trade window; proof is the following same-run UI-trace for the filtered basecamp-NPC marker

steps.label: filter_basecamp_npc_marker_saxophone
steps.expected_visible_fact: Same open Pay trade window, filtered to the distinct basecamp-assigned-NPC inventory marker item.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_basecamp_npc_marker_saxophone
steps.abort_reason: same open Pay trade selector did not trace the basecamp-assigned NPC marker saxophone after filtering
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run trade selector UI-trace proves the filtered Pay window contains saxophone from a basecamp-assigned NPC inventory

steps.label: open_filter_clear_for_storage_marker
steps.expected_immediate_state: clear the trade filter without closing the Pay trade window; proof is the following same-run UI-trace for the filtered basecamp-storage marker

steps.label: filter_basecamp_storage_marker_gold_watch
steps.expected_visible_fact: Same open Pay trade window, filtered to the distinct basecamp storage-zone marker item stack.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_basecamp_storage_marker_gold_watch
steps.abort_reason: same open Pay trade selector did not trace the basecamp storage-zone marker gold_watch after filtering
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run trade selector UI-trace proves the filtered Pay window contains gold_watch from the basecamp storage-zone map pool

steps.label: autobalance_storage_gold_watch_stack
steps.expected_visible_fact: F1 autobalance selected enough of the filtered basecamp-storage gold watch stack into the player's offer to cover the Pay debt.
steps.expected_immediate_state: F1 autobalance applies to the filtered basecamp-storage offer; proof is deferred to the following acceptance prompt and paid trade artifact.

steps.label: confirm_trade_offer
steps.expected_visible_fact: Balanced shakedown payment offer opened the case-sensitive trade acceptance prompt.
steps.abort_reason: balanced basecamp-pool trade did not show the case-sensitive acceptance prompt

steps.label: accept_trade_confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: confirmed the proven case-sensitive trade prompt; paid outcome proof is deferred to the same-run log gate

steps.label: audit_payment_writeback_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove paid trade result after selecting items from the honest basecamp/faction-side Pay window
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log records paid trade result and shakedown paid outcome after a normal npc_trading::trade offer
